pka_results_t Struct Reference
[Public Key Cryptography API (gxcr/pka.h)]

The pka_results_t record type is used to package up the entire set of output operands (of which there can be 0, 1 or 2) as well as other result values like the compare_result (only used for compare op), the result_cnt and the overall status. More...


Data Fields

void * user_data
 Same opaque user_data ptr passed in.
uint8_t opcode
 Opcode of the associated request.
uint8_t result_cnt
 Result cnt must be 0, 1 or 2.
uint8_t status
 Same as result_code.
pka_comparison_t compare_result
 Result of a comparison.
pka_operand_t results [MAX_RESULT_CNT]
 Actual result operand descs.

Detailed Description

The pka_results_t record type is used to package up the entire set of output operands (of which there can be 0, 1 or 2) as well as other result values like the compare_result (only used for compare op), the result_cnt and the overall status.

Field Documentation

void* pka_results_t::user_data

Same opaque user_data ptr passed in.

uint8_t pka_results_t::opcode

Opcode of the associated request.

uint8_t pka_results_t::result_cnt

Result cnt must be 0, 1 or 2.

uint8_t pka_results_t::status

Same as result_code.

pka_comparison_t pka_results_t::compare_result

Result of a comparison.

pka_operand_t pka_results_t::results[MAX_RESULT_CNT]

Actual result operand descs.
